sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12389" key="a)podakru=tiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποδακρ-ῦτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n12389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calling forth tears,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολλύρια</foreign> ibid., cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:14:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.14.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
